attributes.action: Create a £5,000 tax-free allowance for online marketplace income
attributes.additional_details: We want the UK Government to introduce a £5,000 annual tax-free allowance for income earned through online marketplaces. Many people use platforms such as eBay, Vinted, Depop and Etsy to supplement their income during a period of high living costs. We believe a £5,000 tax-free allowance would encourage entrepreneurship, help households manage rising costs and reduce administrative burdens for people earning modest additional income.
attributes.background: We want the UK Government to create a £5,000 annual tax-free allowance for income earned through online marketplaces, including eBay, Vinted, Depop and similar platforms.

rejection.details: We appear to have opened a petition in your name which duplicates the text of another one which is opened. We are looking to see what has happened. We apologise for this error.
